response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience (15+ years) with a strong alignment to the primary and secondary tech stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, Nest.js, React, Kotlin/Java). His roles at re:cinq, Optilyz, and GISCollective highlight deep expertise in scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and geospatial applications. While his recent work leans heavily on TypeScript/Node.js, his background includes diverse languages (DLang, Java, C++) and cloud-native development (Kubernetes, Docker, AWS), meeting core qualifications. Minor gaps include limited explicit mention of Vitest (though Jest is referenced) and AI agent development experience is implied but not explicitly detailed.
strengths: Extensive full-stack expertise with 15+ years of experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and backend services in Kotlin/Java
Proven track record in scalable systems, cloud-native development (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker), and performance optimization
Strong collaboration and mentorship skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Vitest (testing framework) in recent roles, though Jest and Playwright are referenced
Recent roles focus heavily on TypeScript/Node.js; secondary stack (Kotlin/Java) is less prominent in the most recent 3 years
AI agent development experience is implied but not explicitly detailed in the resume
